final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a female host.

Style/medium: UI mockup of a mobile livestream interface, Chinese social media aesthetic, screenshot style
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame mimicking a phone screen capture, centered host in the main viewing area, overlay UI elements typical of livestream platforms
Subject: elegant female host (神仙姐姐) holding a rectangular sign with both hands, graceful posture, engaging expression facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: soft blurred indoor setting typical of influencer livestream rooms, warm ambient background
Lighting/mood: soft ring-light illumination on the host's face, flattering and approachable atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones against soft neutral background, UI overlays in platform brand colors
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: text on the sign must be clearly legible Chinese characters; maintain 9:16 vertical proportions
Avoid: distorted facial features, illegible text, cluttered background, watermark from other platforms
